zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Stewart於1370年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親Robert III Stewart King of Scotland33歲，母親Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland20歲。她於1390年與Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年9月在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Stewart was born in 1370, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, was 33 and her mother, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, was 20. She married Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas in 1390, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in September 1456, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

Elle a épousé Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas en 1390, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1456, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Stewartが1370年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Robert III Stewart King of Scotlandは33歳，母Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotlandは20歳であった。1390年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでArchibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年9月にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで86歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.Battle of Verneuil, Maine-et-Loire, Pays: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Stewart(이)가 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert III Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1390년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 9월 영국 스코틀랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Stewart nasceu em 1370, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas em 1390, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1456, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.Battle of Verneuil, Maine-et-Loire, Pays: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Stewart родилась в 1370 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert III Stewart King of Scotland было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas в 1390 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1456 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Stewart nació en 1370, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas en 1390, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1456, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
